title: A3C3: AI Algorithm and Accelerator Co-design, Co-search, and Co-generation
abstract: arXiv:2606.20869v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: We present a holistic methodology for artificial intelligence algorithm and accelerator co-design, co-search, and co-generation (A3C3), which jointly optimizes neural network architectures and their hardware implementations to address the inefficiencies of traditional top-down AI system design flows. Conventional AI deployment often treats model design and hardware mapping as separate stages: an algorithm is first developed for accuracy, and only afterward adapted to meet latency, throughput, energy, or resource constraints. This separation can lead to suboptimal systems, particularly as modern AI workloads become increasingly heterogeneous, memory-intensive, and platform-dependent. A3C3 instead parameterizes both algorithmic and accelerator design spaces and searches them jointly, enabling the automatic generation of model-accelerator pairs that better balance accuracy, latency, throughput, energy efficiency, and hardware util

translated_title: A3C3：人工智能算法与加速器的协同设计、协同搜索与协同生成
translated_abstract: 我们提出了一种用于人工智能算法与加速器协同设计、协同搜索与协同生成（A3C3）的整体方法论，该方法联合优化神经网络架构及其硬件实现，以解决传统自上而下AI系统设计流程的低效问题。传统AI部署通常将模型设计与硬件映射视为独立阶段：先针对准确性开发算法，随后再调整以满足延迟、吞吐量、能耗或资源约束。这种分离可能导致次优系统，尤其是在现代AI工作负载日益异构化、内存密集型和平台依赖化的背景下。A3C3通过参数化算法和加速器设计空间，并进行联合搜索，能够自动生成模型-加速器对，从而更好地平衡准确性、延迟、吞吐量、能效和硬件利用率。
tldr: 本文提出一种联合优化神经网络架构与硬件实现的方法，通过参数化设计空间并协同搜索，自动生成平衡准确性、延迟、吞吐量、能效和硬件利用率的最优模型-加速器对。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes a joint optimization of neural network architectures and hardware implementations by parameterizing design spaces and co-searching, automatically generating model-accelerator pairs that better balance accuracy, latency, throughput, energy efficiency, and hardware utilization.
